tasks.title: Freeze architecture guard baseline
tasks.commit_message: test: freeze architecture guard baseline and block new regressions
tasks.prompt: Work in E:/PythonProject/ClassroomToolkit. Execute Task 1 only: strengthen tests/ClassroomToolkit.Tests/ArchitectureDependencyTests.cs so App-layer dependency regressions are blocked while current baseline remains passing. Keep changes minimal and scoped to this task. Update tests first where needed. Run related tests and stop after completion.

Update or add CrossPage tests as needed. Restrict edits to CrossPage-related files and stop after completion.
